prompt: Assess the research summary and provide rubric-aligned feedback.

criteria.name: Methodological Rigor
criteria.description: Quality of methods, controls, and validity.

performance_descriptors.excellent: Appropriate design with strong validity and controls.
performance_descriptors.good: Mostly appropriate; minor threats to validity.

criteria.name: Interpretation
criteria.description: Accuracy and nuance in interpreting results.

few_shots.final_submission: Participants were randomly assigned; effect persisted after covariate control. Limitations include small n and campus-only sample.
The study is informative and compelling. The methods are logical and the results are impactful and meaningful.

submissions.final_submission: The manipulation check failed for Group B; thus, the null result may stem from inadequate induction rather than absence of effect.
This research has many strengths and only a few weaknesses. The conclusions are robust and insightful.
I wrote the results section and asked AI to suggest clearer transitions; stats reporting decisions are mine.
